steps.title: Use a colon after lists
steps.content: The phrase ending with lists is a complete independent clause. The material after the blank names a specific list and explains what Shonagon catalogs in it.

steps.title: Place punctuation correctly
steps.content: Choice B runs the independent clause into the elaboration without punctuation. Choice C puts a colon after the preposition in, where the phrase is incomplete. Choice D uses a comma where stronger punctuation is needed. A colon after the complete clause correctly introduces the elaboration. The answer is A.
